summary: Alumni Reunion web project. Footer text updated to 'Built with ❤️ by Athira S' (Athira S in italics). Version 36 is the current baseline.

existing_features.title: In the Footer component, change the attribution text from 'Built with ❤️ using caffeine.ai' to 'Built with ❤️ by Athira S', where 'Athira S' is rendered in italic style. All other content, layout, and styling in the Footer must remain exactly as in Version 36.
